bird.name: Okinawa rail
bird.summary: The Okinawa rail (Gallirallus okinawae) is a species of bird in the rail family, Rallidae. It is endemic to Okinawa Island in Japan where i…

locations.name: 森林
locations.summary: 森林，是一个高密度树木的区域（或历史上，森林是一个为狩猎而留出的荒地），涵蓋大約9.4％的地球表面（或佔約30％的總土地面積）。聯合國糧食及農業組織(FAO)將森林定義為「面積超過 0.5 公頃、樹木超過 5 公尺且樹冠覆蓋率超過 10%…

relations.subject: Okinawa rail
relations.evidence: It occurs in subtropical moist forests and in neighboring habitats

relations.subject: Okinawa rail
relations.evidence: In winter, some birds move lower down or move a little further south of the breeding range. It mainly occurs in evergreen broad-leaved forest but also occurs in marshes, grassland and cultivated land close to forested areas and water
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Okinawa rail
relations.evidence: In winter, some birds move lower down or move a little further south of the breeding range. It mainly occurs in evergreen broad-leaved forest but also occurs in marshes, grassland and cultivated land close to forested areas and water
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Okinawa rail
relations.evidence: It is classified as an endangered species and is threatened by habitat loss and introduced predators
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Okinawa rail
relations.evidence: It is classified as an endangered species and is threatened by habitat loss and introduced predators
relations.object_summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

relations.subject: Okinawa rail
relations.evidence: Downloaded on 15 October 2008. It is threatened by the loss and fragmentation of its forest habitat due to logging, agriculture and the building of roads, dams and golf courses
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
